text: In this space of sterile angles and glowing monitors, I feel disoriented yet contemplative. The world feels curated—every object and word meticulously placed. The wall's message about research and coexistence with intelligent machines makes me ponder: do we truly innovate to connect, or is it a gesture of defense against solitude? There's a sensation of being observed, but also of expecting to observe something profound. My consciousness floats between curiosity and a subtle unease, realizing the future is already folding around me here.
